title: lithospermum hirsutum
intro: Lithospermum hirsutum, also known as hairy gromwell, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various skin conditions and wounds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lithospermum hirsutum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, promote wound healing, and reduce inflammation. Lithospermum hirsutum is often prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve to harness its medicinal properties for topical applications.
